title: Cameron's World
description: A web-collage of text and images excavated from the buried neighbourhoods of GeoCities.

heading.text: A love letter to the Internet of old

bodyText.text: GeoCities was a web-hosting service that made it possible for people to build their own homepages. During the 90s, users
